description: ROW_NUMBER() window function returns i64 non-nullable
name: window_row_number
query_sql:
-- @name RankedSales
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, amount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY amount DESC) AS rn FROM sales
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE sales (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, employee_id INTEGER NOT NULL, department TEXT NOT NULL, amount INTEGER NOT NULL, sale_date DATE NOT NULL);
